title: Cobblemon: Interact Wheel Additions
description: An open-source addon mod for Cobblemon which adds additional features for the Interact Wheel.
body: **Cobblemon: Interact Wheel Additions** is a client-sided addon mod for Cobblemon 1.7+ which adds additional features for the expanded Interact Wheel. **Features of this mod:** - Adds additional buttons to the Interact Wheel for both Pokemon and player interactions. - One is an alternative method for closing the menu without using Esc. - The other opens a new UI menu for reordering the options in the menu. Players can move the tiles around and change how the orientation of the options in the menus. The configuration is saved when the menu is closed. - Uses config for storing the option layouts per interaction type, Pokemon or player. - This config data can be shared or included with a modpack to provide default or recommended options layouts. If you have an issue with the mod, please either [join the Cobblemon Discord](https://discord.gg/cobblemon "Join the Cobblemon Discord") and reach out in this mod's [dedicated support thread](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1444048123558232247) or raise a ticket in the [Issues board](https://gitlab.com/StarliteHeart/cobblemon-iwa/-/issues "Cobblemon: IWA Issues") of the source repository!
